verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This is my time, this is the end time, I can't think of any better day that I'd rather live; Gonna let the world know, won't wait for tomorrow, I'm gonna let my little light shine, 'Cause this is my time.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I think of all the saints who've gone before, They lived and testified about the Lord; They had their chance to do their part, To serve the Lord with all their heart; Now the time is ours to hold the sword.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To be there watching Moses part the sea, To stand and fight with David's army; I'd love to live in Jesus' day, But if I had to choose my way, This is sure the time that I would be.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm gonna preach the Word and work while it is day, I'm gonna say the things that He would have me say; I'm gonna shine the light in my family, I'm gonna lift Him up for all the world to see, See Him down in me.
